  • Changelog

Define a response that requires several processes to finish

all_of.Rd

Define a response that requires several processes to finish

Usage

all_of(...)

Arguments

...

Accumulator labels or expression objects to combine with AND.

Value

An expression object.

Examples

all_of("A", "B")
#> $kind
#> [1] "and"
#> 
#> $args
#> $args[[1]]
#> $args[[1]]$kind
#> [1] "event"
#> 
#> $args[[1]]$source
#> [1] "A"
#> 
#> $args[[1]]$k
#> NULL
#> 
#> 
#> $args[[2]]
#> $args[[2]]$kind
#> [1] "event"
#> 
#> $args[[2]]$source
#> [1] "B"
#> 
#> $args[[2]]$k
#> NULL
#> 
#> 
#>
